root_cause: file-bug.sh, bug-status.sh, file-backlog-item.sh, and backlog-item-status.sh all call git commit after lifecycle operations. Tests in test-bug-scripts.sh and test-backlog-scripts.sh invoked these scripts against paths inside the live repo, causing real commits to land in branch history.
fix_approach: Rewrote affected test cases to use an isolated mktemp+git-init repo (ISO_REPO). Tests cd into ISO_REPO before calling scripts so git rev-parse resolves the temp repo; commits land in ISO_REPO. Scripts themselves unchanged — production behavior (git commit into the bug/item dir's repo) is correct. Added test-bug-git-isolation.sh with t_iso1/t_iso2 to verify isolation holds (live count unchanged, ISO_REPO gains commit).
scope: test files only — no script behavior changed
